stemHtml: During pre-flight, while checking the route entered in the FMS by the pilot, it is noticed that the FMS navigation database is out-of-date. The decision is taken to change the FMS navigation database cycle to the current cycle. After changing the navigation database cycle...

options.a: The FMS will restart, deleting all entered information.
options.b: There will be data missing on some of the sector legs.
options.c: The previously entered route data will remain unaffected.
options.d: All previously entered route data will be deleted.
